title: Align event taxonomy and enforce lifecycle invariants
summary: Bring event types and invariant enforcement in line with 0.4.0 taxonomy and lifecycle rules.
outputs: Event taxonomy aligned with implementation event types
Invariant enforcement for intent-before-mutation and ordering rules
Validation errors surfaced for invalid sequences
Commit boundary metadata defined for tx.commit.start/done payloads
acceptance_criteria: All emitted tx event types are defined in the taxonomy.
Intent state transitions are monotonic and validated.
Verify/commit ordering violations are rejected during replay or write-time validation.
Commit boundary payloads include branch/commit hash/diff summary fields.

steps.description: Resolve taxonomy gaps (e.g., user intent event naming) and update emitters accordingly.
Add lifecycle invariant validation in state rebuild and write-time checks.
Ensure intent-before-mutation and planned_step linkage are enforced.
Define tx.commit.start/done payload fields for branch, commit hash, and diff summary.

notes: Prefer rejecting invalid sequences early rather than silently repairing.
Ensure validation aligns with lifecycle_invariants.md ordering rules.
